## Severe Pediatric Obesity — Multi-Query Population Identification

### 📐 Age Window Calculation (Ages 5–17 as of 2026-06-02)
| Bound | Logic | Birthdate Filter |
|---|---|---|
| ≥ 5 years old | Born on or before 2021-06-02 | `birthdate=le2021-06-02` |
| ≤ 17 years old | Born on or after 2008-06-02 | `birthdate=ge2008-06-02` |

---

## Query Block 1 — Severe Obesity Diagnoses (ICD-10-CM)

> Targets: **E66.01** (morbid/severe obesity due to excess calories), **E66.2** (morbid obesity with alveolar hypoventilation / Pickwickian), **Z68.54** (pediatric BMI ≥ 95th percentile for age)

```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|E66.01,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|E66.2,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|Z68.54&patient.birthdate=ge2008-06-02&patient.birthdate=le2021-06-02&clinical-status=active&_include=Condition:patient
```

---

## Query Block 2 — Severe Obesity Diagnoses (SNOMED CT)

> Targets: **238136002** (Morbid obesity), **408512008** (BMI 40+ — severely obese), **414916001** (Obese — broad parent concept for any unspecified coding)

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|238136002,http://snomed.info/sct|408512008,http://snomed.info/sct|414916001&patient.birthdate=ge2008-06-02&patient.birthdate=le2021-06-02&clinical-status=active&_include=Condition:patient
```

---

## Query Block 3 — BMI Numeric Observations ≥ 30 kg/m²

> LOINC **39156-5** · Unit: `kg/m2` (UCUM) · Lookback: 2 years (2024-06-02 → present) to capture current clinical state

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|39156-5&value-quantity=ge30|http://unitsofmeasure.org|kg/m2&patient.birthdate=ge2008-06-02&patient.birthdate=le2021-06-02&status=final,amended,corrected&date=ge2024-06-02&_include=Observation:patient
```

---

## Query Block 4 — Pediatric BMI-for-Age Percentile ≥ 95th

> LOINC **59576-9** · Unit: `%` (UCUM — URL-encoded as `%25`) · Same age range and 2-year lookback

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|59576-9&value-quantity=ge95|http://unitsofmeasure.org|%25&patient.birthdate=ge2008-06-02&patient.birthdate=le2021-06-02&status=final,amended,corrected&date=ge2024-06-02&_include=Observation:patient
```

---

## 🔗 Union Logic & Code Mapping Reference

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  UNION of all Patient IDs returned across all 4 query blocks        │
│                                                                     │
│  Block 1 ──┐                                                        │
│  Block 2 ──┼──► Deduplicate on Patient.id ──► Final Cohort         │
│  Block 3 ──┤                                                        │
│  Block 4 ──┘                                                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

| Code | System | Meaning | Block |
|---|---|---|---|
| `E66.01` | ICD-10-CM | Morbid (severe) obesity, excess calories | 1 |
| `E66.2` | ICD-10-CM | Morbid obesity + alveolar hypoventilation | 1 |
| `Z68.54` | ICD-10-CM | Pediatric BMI ≥ 95th %ile for age | 1 |
| `238136002` | SNOMED CT | Morbid obesity (disorder) | 2 |
| `408512008` | SNOMED CT | BMI 40+ — severely obese (finding) | 2 |
| `414916001` | SNOMED CT | Obese — parent concept | 2 |
| `39156-5` | LOINC | BMI ratio [kg/m²] ≥ 30 | 3 |
| `59576-9` | LOINC | BMI percentile per age/sex ≥ 95 | 4 |

### ⚠️ Implementation Notes

- **`patient.birthdate` chaining** — supported in FHIR R4; if your server doesn't support chained params on Condition/Observation, run a `Patient?birthdate=ge2008-06-02&birthdate=le2021-06-02` query first to get the pediatric Patient IDs, then filter downstream resources by `patient=[id]`.
- **`clinical-status=active`** on Condition blocks resolved/refuted diagnoses; remove if you want historical records.
- **Observation date lookback** — set to `ge2024-06-02` (2 years). Adjust to `ge2025-06-02` (1 year) if you only want well-child-visit-era measurements, or remove entirely for all-time.
- **`_include=Condition:patient` / `_include=Observation:patient`** — returns the full `Patient` resource bundle inline, so you don't need separate patient lookups.
- **`E66.09`** (other obesity) is intentionally excluded — it captures general pediatric obesity, not specifically *severe*; add it if your institution uses it for severe cases.
